goal: Create M6-RC sign-off evidence bundle and CTO decision based on current M6 export evidence, without claiming v0 RC GO while FE v6 mockup implementation remains outstanding.
head: 841d620
blocked_scope: Benchmark number edits or invented benchmark claims
DB schema, migration, or model changes
Export runtime or worker behavior changes
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M6-RC sign-off writes only docs/reviews/M6 evidence/decision files, WORKING closeout, PABCD state, and verification artifacts generated by required commands.
warnings: M6-RC final decision is NOT_GO because FE v6 mockup implementation evidence and real digest-pinned Docker image runtime evidence are missing.
bootstrap scaffold verify-only records toolchain_report.strict=false by design and updates pii_holdout_report phase=scaffold.
bootstrap verify-only --skip-install records pip-audit as skipped if isolated pip upgrade cannot complete.
tests/export emits existing FastAPI ORJSONResponse deprecation warnings.

phase_notes.plan: Create M6 review bundle: evidence summary, discipline sign-off matrix, and CTO decision. M6 export evidence may be GO, but v0 RC decision must remain NO_GO if FE v6 mockup implementation is not complete.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, CONTEXT, M6 handoff, Dev Plan M6/v0 RC gates, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE review rules and DoD, M0 review formats, and current artifacts/review/security inventory.
phase_notes.build: Created required M6 review artifacts for FE, DB, BE/API, LLM/Training, Eval/QC, Security, Architecture/Code Quality, DevEx/Environment, sign-off matrix, and CTO decision. Export evidence is recorded, but RC decision is NOT_GO due missing FE v6 and real Docker runtime evidence.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, scaffold verify-only, tests/export, Dockerfile security test, export secret scan self-test, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, unstaged diff whitespace, and staged diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: M6-RC sign-off bundle committed as 841d620. WORKING and PABCD closeout are recorded in this follow-up commit before push.

pabcd.approved_scope: M6-RC evidence and decision documentation plus generated verification artifacts only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No code/spec/mockup/foundation/handoff edits and no FE implementation in this sign-off contract.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.done: M6-RC sign-off is closed as NOT_GO; next gate is FE v6 implementation followed by real Docker runtime evidence and M6-RC re-review.
